REFERENCE: This citation contains a significant DOI-journal mismatch. The DOI '10.1038/j.cell.2021.12.026' is formatted for a *Cell* / Nature journal publication, not for *BMJ* (British Medical Journal), which would use DOI prefix '10.1136/bmj.'. A BMJ article (volume 375, identifier e068037) would have a DOI like '10.1136/bmj-2021-068037'. The title, journal name, volume, and article ID appear to reference a real or plausible BMJ paper about ambient heat and emergency department visits, but the DOI, PMID (34936760), and PMCID (PMC7611677) may correspond to a different publication (possibly a Cell journal article) or may be mismatched. The authors listed (Zheng Y, Kim C, Wilson C, Kern N, Pitsawong W, Villali J, Kern D, Nguyen V, Hadzipasic A) may not match the actual authors of the BMJ article. This strongly suggests the citation was either fabricated (possibly AI-generated) or assembled from multiple unrelated sources.
